note: APPEND-ONLY. Prior evidence untouched. Establishes source truth on the final HEAD (branch order: sage-canary-release-candidate → sage-money-boundary-closure).

correction.claim: The prior canary-runtime-closure-v2 live harness was described as exercising founder approval.
correction.reality: It called the approval SERVICE directly (verifyPlanForApproval + approveRevision) and only COMPARED the wrong-founder address (after.founderWallet !== wrongWallet); it did NOT exercise the authenticated approval ROUTE with a real verified session/signature. authenticatedApprovalRouteProven is therefore FALSE until P6 tests it (and if only the service can be tested, it stays false).
